Claude Commander

Projects & sessions
connecting…
Select a session
Pick a session on the left to view its terminal, or create a new one with ＋. Keystrokes you type here are sent live to that session.

Session info

New session

Add project

Register a single git repo by its path, or scan a directory for repos.

Settings

Default program is set via the server's Programs list; editor and worktrees dir are configured on the server host.

Connect to server

This server requires a bearer token. Paste the token claude-commander-server printed on startup.

Review
